debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
inst✝ : CommRing R
ι : Type
I : ι → Ideal R
⊢ Injective ⇑(@Ideal.chineseMap R inst✝ ι I)

proof:
rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x, rfl⟩
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, ← chineseMap_mk' I x i, hx]
  rfl
failed_attempts:
rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨a, rfl⟩
  rw [chineseMap_mk] at hx
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  exact (Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem _).mp (congr_fun hx i)

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨a, rfl⟩
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, ← chineseMap_mk' a i, hx]
  rfl

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨a, rfl⟩
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, ← chineseMap_mk' a i]
  exact congr_fun hx i

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨a, rfl⟩
  simp [chineseMap_mk, funext_iff, Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] at hx
  exact (Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem _).2 (mem_iInf.2 hx)

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨r, rfl⟩
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, ← chineseMap_mk' r i, hx]
  rfl

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', rfl⟩
  rw [chineseMap_mk] at hx
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  exact (Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem _).mp (congr_fun hx i)
successful_attempts:

  intro x hx

  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, ← chineseMap_mk' I x i, hx]
  rfl

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]

  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, ← chineseMap_mk' I a i]
  exact congr_fun hx i

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x, rfl⟩
  simpa [chineseMap_mk, Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf, funext_iff] using hx

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', rfl⟩
  simpa [funext_iff, chineseMap_mk, Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, mem_iInf] using hx

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
